name: DeepWiki
description: AI-powered documentation search for any public GitHub repository. Ask questions about a codebase in plain English (DeepWiki by Devin, free, no auth).

tools.name: read_wiki_structure
tools.description: List the documentation topics that exist for a GitHub repository.

tools.name: read_wiki_contents
tools.description: Fetch the full generated wiki for a GitHub repository.

tools.name: ask_question
tools.description: Ask a natural-language question about a GitHub repository and get an AI-grounded answer.

author: freddy-schuetz
